stage: Stage 1 — file-only, no listeners, no executors
novalum_shield_clause: INHERITS — no tier may auto-trigger NovaLUM device.write
human_in_loop_clause: INHERITS — every tier event observable in qdd-recon-allhands meeting room
registered_by: asolaria-instance@acer per Jesse 'Yes begin' tier-2 cosign 2026-04-07T02:30Z

instant.compute_envelope: hot path lookups, no GNN inference, in-memory cache hits only

micro.compute_envelope: lightweight inference, single-pass model, in-memory data only

medium.compute_envelope: moderate compute, real GNN inference, single-machine, GPU welcome but not required
use_cases: GSLGNN scoring at moderate scale (1-100K examples)

small.compute_envelope: small hardware footprint — NO GPU REQUIRED, can run on any host including resource-constrained nodes
small.naming_rationale: small refers to hardware footprint (no GPU), NOT to latency. small tier can take longer than medium but uses less hardware.

leader.compute_envelope: as long as needed — full leader deliberation, cross-tier synthesis, operator-witness gates

tier_routing_rules: events arrive via webhook (Stage 3+) carrying a tier_target field
if no tier_target, default to instant + escalate as needed
tier escalation order: instant -> micro -> medium -> small (if hardware class differs) -> leader
leader tier output is the final word, no further escalation
every tier transition logged to omnidirectional calendar with cube tags
constraint_invariants: RG-1 NovaLUM shield enforced at every tier
RG-11 human-in-loop enforced at every tier (events posted to qdd-recon-allhands)
no tier may bypass omni-request-box hard-deny rules
tier registry is append-only — tiers may be added but never removed silently
every registered_unit must exist in units-registry.json
every unit must declare its tier in units-registry.json (Stage 1 extension)
what_this_does_NOT_include: Any executable code (this is JSON registry only)
next_step: Stage 2 — omnitranslator stub. Pluggable translator framework. omnilanguage <-> JSON pair as the first pair. No cross-host translation yet.
